Integrated Ecosystem

One Platform.
Complete Growth.

We have integrated one powerful engine that connects all the basic needs to be a perfect student and professional. Explore the tools that will redefine your journey.

Sign Up Now Explore Features

Agent Knott

Online • Career Tutor
I noticed you're targeting a Product Manager role. Based on your current projects, I recommend improving your Agile methodology skills.
Here is a curated learning path for you to get industry-ready while you study.
Ask Agent Knott for guidance...
AI Advisor

Meet Agent Knott.
Your Personal Success Coach.

Imagine having a mentor who knows your academic curriculum, understands your dream job, and guides you bridge the gap. That's Agent Knott.

Specialized Answers

Context-aware responses tailored to your specific curriculum.

Step-by-Step Logic

Breaks down complex problems into clear, digestible steps.

Instant Translation

Learn in your native language with one-click translation.

Customized Modes

Switch between Exam Mode or Deep Dive for mastering topics.

Quick Actions

Single-click for summarization, quiz generation, code reviews.

Exam Prep

Targeted revision plans and previous year analysis.

Proactive Feature

Stay Ahead with the Smart Calendar

Designed for the student who wants to be proactive. Never miss a deadline, exam, or opportunity again.

Agent Knott Sync

Seamlessly sync study plans directly from your AI tutor.

Answer Vault

Save exam-prepared answers with reminders for quick revision.

Time Management

Calculate study gaps and optimize your daily routine automatically.

Study Schedules

Adaptive timetables that shift dynamically when you miss sessions.

Goal Tracking

Visualize semester progress and hit GPA targets with precision.

Smart Reminders

Intelligent alerts that know exactly when you need to start preparing.

Data Driven

AI-Powered Skill Analysis

Don't guess what you need to learn. Our AI engine analyzes millions of job descriptions and compares them against your current profile to identify exactly where you stand.

Strength Identification

Pinpoint your exact strengths and areas for improvement with AI precision.

Unlimited Resources

Access curated learning links from top platforms, tailored to your gaps.

Job Recommendations

Get matched with roles that fit your current skill profile perfectly.

Adaptive Quizzes

Test your knowledge with adaptive quizzes that get harder as you improve.

Interview Practice

Mock interviews with real-time feedback on your answers and delivery.

Real-Time Market Data

Live data streams predicting future skill demands so you're never left behind.

Career Focused

Clarify Your Target Roles

Success starts with a clear destination. We help you reverse-engineer your career path starting from the role you want to land.

Dedicated Role Training

Focused training modules specifically designed to master your chosen role.

Skill Gap Improvement

Automatically identify and bridge gaps between your skills and job requirements.

5000+ Roles

Trained on a massive database of roles to meet diverse job demands.

Industry Level Requirements

Know exactly what the industry demands with real-time skill mapping.

Custom Roadmaps

Milestone-based learning paths customized to your pace and goals.

Similar Role Recommendations

Discover alternative career paths that align with your existing skill set.

AI Trainer

AI-Career Roadmap.
Your Blueprint to Industry Readiness.

Don't blindly study. Generate a milestone-based roadmap reverse-engineered from your dream jobs. Master each node step-by-step with real-world examples.

Dynamic Milestones

Automatic roadmaps dynamically calibrated to your dream job requirements.

Real-World Code

Learn architecture and coding using actual industry codebase structures.

Progress Analytics

Track your completion percentage and estimated timeline to get hired.

Skills Validation

Automatic tasks at each milestone to test your skills and unlock the next stage.

Live Sync

Automatically syncs and updates your live portfolio as you complete milestones.

Virtual Internship

Unlocks a 3-month virtual internship simulation after finishing the roadmap.

Premium Feature

Corporate Grade Portfolio

Stop sending static PDFs. Impress recruiters with a live, interactive portfolio website that updates itself.

Corporate Grade Templates

Sleek, modern designs crafted to highlight your professional profile.

ATS Friendly Resume

Build a recruiter-ready resume in less than a minute that passes all bot filters.

Download Unlimited

No restrictions. Download as many versions as you need.

Share Profile

Instantly share your live portfolio link with recruiters on LinkedIn and email.

Live Hosting

Your portfolio is hosted on a custom subdomain, live and ready to view instantly.

Interactive Charts

Visualize your skills and project impact with dynamic, interactive charts.

For Institutions

Institutional Command Center

Administer your entire college from a single, powerful platform. Identify potential, track performance, and drive career outcomes at scale.

Unified Campus Control

Control entire college operations under one centralized platform.

Real-Time Scorecard

Identify every user's potential instantly with live scoring and analytics.

Performance Tracking

Monitor academic and skill-based performance trends across departments.

Targeted Focus

Identify at-risk students and provide additional focus to boost their growth.

Placement Accelerator

Ensure students are trained on industry-demand roles to meet market needs.

Transition Analytics

Track end-to-end user transitions from student to employed professional.
